zh.Cranbrook, Tunbridge Wells, Kent, Englan: 英國英格蘭肯特坦布利其 威爾斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Hendley於1426年出生在英國英格蘭肯特坦布利其 威爾斯時，他的父親John Hendley27歲，母親Mary Forster26歲。他與Joan Shoyswell結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1495年2月11日在英國肯特可藍別盧可享年69歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特可藍別盧可。

nameMeanings.name: Hendley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Hanley or else a variant of Henley with intrusive -d-.

variants.name: Hanley
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Conor, Declan, Donovan, Eamonn, John Patrick.

Irish: shortened form of O'Hanley, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hÁinle ‘descendant of Áinle’, a personal name meaning ‘champion’. This is the name of a former ruling family in Connacht and is now common throughout southern Ireland.

English: habitational name from any of the many places called Handley (Cheshire, Derbyshire, Dorset, Northamptonshire) or Hanley (Staffordshire, Worcestershire), named with Old English hēan, the weak dative form (originally used after a preposition and article) of hēah ‘high’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Hendley was born in 1426, in Tunbridge Wells, Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Hendley, was 27 and his mother, Mary Forster, was 26. He married Joan Shoyswell. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 11 February 1495, in Cranbrook, Kent, England, at the age of 69, and was buried in Cranbrook, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

Il est décédé le 11 février 1495, à Cranbrook, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Cranbrook, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Hendleyが1426年にイギリスイギリスケントトゥンブリッジ ウエルズで生まれた時，父John Hendleyは27歳，母Mary Forsterは26歳であった。Joan Shoyswellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1495年2月11日にイギリスケントクランブルークで69歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントクランブルークにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Hendley(이)가 1426년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 툰브리지 웰스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Hendley(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Forster(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Joan Shoyswell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1495년 2월 11일 영국 켄트 크랜브룩에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 크랜브룩에 묻혔다.

Он умер 11 февраля 1495 г. в местности кранбрук, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности кранбрук, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.
